steps.title: Use distance from zero
steps.content: The equation $|x|=9$ means $x$ is $9$ units from $0$, so the two solutions are opposites.

steps.title: Pick the positive value
steps.content: The question asks for the positive solution, so use the positive value from the two absolute-value solutions.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the equation as written and choose the positive intersection. The answer is 9.
